i can't think of anything to say here 😭 i'm just watching video essays one after the other so i have no thoughts right now.

i do want to thank everyone for the lovely comments 🫶🏼 i read them all and i wish i could respond to so many :/ janitorai needs a chat section or something because i would vibe so well with everyone here 🫢
